hypothesis: Incorporating an aromaticity-aware valency constraint into the training objective of 3D equivariant generative models—explicitly conditioning generation on (number of aromatic bonds, non-aromatic bond-order) tuples—will produce models whose generated molecules have higher molecular stability under the arom-dependent valency metric and a lower mean GFN2-xTB relaxation energy (∆Erelax) than otherwise-identical models trained without this constraint.
